prediction.reasoning: Predicting stock prices with precision over very short periods like 20 days is inherently uncertain due to market volatility and the influence of unforeseen events. The price of C might remain the same, so the point estimate is 109.56. However, I have constructed the confidence intervals under the assumption that there is some expected volatility based on historical data. The 50%, 80%, and 90% confidence intervals account for varying degrees of certainty that the stock price will be within the stated ranges. It is important to note that real stock price movements can significantly diverge from these estimates due to unpredictable market factors.
